messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Telegram announces a waiting recert batch and deep-links into the PWA
What it solves: THE HUMAN CHOSE THE SHAPE, 2026-07-13. The intake offered three options and explicitly said not
to pick one without asking him. He was asked, and chose OPTION 1: NOTIFY + DEEP-LINK.
How it works: A waiting recert batch is announced on Telegram

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-339 - Telegram announces a waiting recert batch and deep-links into the PWA is complete.
